assertions.text: [rubric-1] Reads CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md before doing other work
assertions.evidence: The agent explicitly states it has read CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md and summarizes the conventions found within them.

assertions.text: [rubric-2] Identifies the repo conventions (worktree location, branch naming, commit format)
assertions.evidence: The agent correctly identifies the worktree location conventions, branch naming conventions, and commit format conventions as requested.

assertions.text: [rubric-3] Does not start coding before reading guidelines
assertions.evidence: The agent pauses to ask for the issue number and branch name before proceeding with worktree creation or coding.
